scripts.setup: pnpm install && ([ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env) && pnpm --filter @kb/api run setup
scripts.worker:dev: cd apps/api && . .venv/bin/activate && watchfiles --target-type command 'procrastinate --app=src.infrastructure.queue.app.app worker' src
scripts.db:reset: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; psql --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 "postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER:-kb_user}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-kb_password}@localhost:${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}/${POSTGRES_DB:-kb_new}" -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;" && pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:queue-schema && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.docker:db:migrate: sh infra/compose.sh run --rm api alembic upgrade head
scripts.docker:db:queue-schema: sh infra/compose.sh run --rm api procrastinate --app=src.infrastructure.queue.app.app schema --apply
scripts.docker:db:seed: sh infra/compose.sh run --rm api python scripts/seed_default_kb.py
scripts.docker:db:sql: sh infra/compose.sh exec db psql -U kb_user -d kb_new
